response.justification: Nearly two decades of fullstack experience with strong TypeScript/Node.js product work, current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling development, and demonstrated depth in testing culture (TDD, test frameworks, workshops) map directly onto the role's core requirements; cloud (AWS CDK), Kubernetes, Docker, and MongoDB experience round out the profile, though some named stack items (Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin) are not evidenced.
strengths: Extensive TypeScript/Node.js fullstack experience across product companies
Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work matches the AI agent requirement
Strong engineering-practice background: TDD, CI/CD, testing tools authorship, and teaching
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest/Playwright experience listed
Frontend depth leans toward Ember; React exposure appears limited to one role
Kotlin and Python absent from skills despite multi-language requirement

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience
Gaps in named stack (Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin)
